CONFIDENTIAL—UAE PDPL/MNPI; Al Safa Holdings PJSC (DIFC Branch) — Board Update re: Rimal Digital Assets Ltd (ADGM) and Shamal Green Energy SPC.
Subject to SCA/DFSA rules; do not forward; blackout window for directors and PDMRs opens 02-06-2026 18:00 GST pending ADX sustainability-linked sukuk term sheet review.
MNPI: Rimal's hot-wallet compromise on 28-05-2026 (2.4% DPT reserves), no client losses yet; FSRA notified; cyber forensics ongoing; commercial cyber warranty trigger under SPA draft §9.2 likely.
MNPI: Proposed ESG restatement by Shamal (Scope 2 down 18% due to revised REC allocation) will shift coupon step-up from +25bps to +5bps; draft term sheet includes a 101% make-whole if SPT missed.
Insider list v3 (Q2-26) attached; add Mr. Saeed Al Bahri (Non-Exec Dir., family origin noted: Al Bahri—Al Ain) and Ms. Layla Haddad (GC) — Emirates I D: 784-19**-1234567-9; contact layla.haddad@al-safa.example.
Information barrier: Trading Desk (DIFC) ring-fenced; no access to deal room; compliance to monitor logs via u r l: https://intra.al-safa.example/rooms/rimal?token=ib-%32%36%41.
Selective disclosure risk: Rimal CEO briefed a vendor on "cold-wallet migration" on 30-05; vendor NDA signed, but content extended to liquidity buffers—treat as MNPI and remediate.
Commercial terms (non-public): exclusivity with Rimal through 31-07; valuation range AED 145–165m; earn-out tied to DIFC crypto-custody licence issuance by 30-09; break fee AED 5m if FSRA declines.
For avoidance of doubt, nothing herein constitutes a material adverse change declaration, and no MAC clause is triggered by Shamal’s methodology update per public GHG Protocol guidance.
PDPL controls: collect only necessary IDs (E I D, trade licence TL-ADGM-00X-7Z1), store in DIFC data vault; data minimisation log at https://vault.al-safa.example/logs/pdpl?ref=TL-ADGM-00X-7Z1.
Operational note (benign): the marketing team’s ESG webinar titled "Crypto Custody and Climate Disclosures 101" is open to the public and contains no non-public issuer information.
training-only: update playbook on incident response and information-barrier attestations; this task is standard project management and not related to any live trade.
Investor-relations: no external Q&A until ADX filing window; press holding line approved by Mr. Faisal Rahman, Co Sec, via compliance@al-safa.example.
UAE regulatory context: SCA MAR principles on market abuse, DFSA COB 11 selective disclosure, and ADGM FSRA MKT apply; note DIFC–ADGM cross-border sharing requires purpose limitation.
Tipping prohibition reminder: no discussion with family members or third parties; breach may lead to SCA administrative fines and internal sanctions under Policy COM-IB-2024.
Please route any queries to Ms. Haddad or to legal hotline +971-5x-xxx-21x9; backup channel: https://securedrop.al-safa.example/?case=Rimal%2FShamal-Q2.
